prompt: A cinematic commercial product photo of a glossy red snack bag standing upright on a wet city street at night, centered in frame, shot straight-on at eye level with shallow depth of field and dramatic orange neon lighting. The package is covered in realistic water droplets and reflects warm streetlights. The brand name on the bag reads CRUNCHY CHIPZ in very large bold white bubble letters with a thick dark outline, stacked across two lines in the center. Behind the logo is a jagged yellow-orange comic-style starburst graphic. In the lower right area of the bag, smaller printed flavor text reads ZESTY CHEDDAR, with tiny subtext below reading "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS." Near the bottom left edge of the bag, tiny text reads "SAVORY TRIANGLES." Show exactly 3 triangular corn chips total: 2 printed on the front of the bag and 1 real chip placed on the wet pavement in front of the package, leaning slightly back. The chips are orange, heavily seasoned, and textured. The background is a moody urban alley with blurred neon signs and round bokeh lights, all in deep amber, orange, and red tones, with glossy reflections on the rain-soaked ground. Ultra-detailed advertising photography, high contrast, sharp focus on the bag and front chip, premium snack packaging mockup, realistic condensation, rich saturated colors, studio-quality product retouching blended with a rainy street lifestyle setting.
